mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, group_name, word, created_at FROM hotword WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY group_name ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hotword WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotword (user_id, group_name, word, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{groupName}, #{word}, NOW(6))
